hunts.name: Mourner
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Found in the lower Ja Tiika Heartland jungle.
Roaming mob — patrol until you find both.

hunts.name: Blue Morpho
tips: 3 targets — kill all 3 to complete.
Large blue butterflies in the lower Yak T'el forest.
Same lower forest tier as Mourner — do both together.

hunts.name: Balyaborr
tips: B ranks roam continuously — no fixed spawn timer.
Teleport to Dirigible Landing aetheryte and sweep open ground north.
Single-target kill — soloable.

hunts.name: Aspis
tips: 3 targets — kill all 3 Aspis to complete.
Common open-world snakes — easy to spot.
Plentiful in the area — shouldn't take long.

hunts.name: Horned Lizard
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Same area as Aspis — do both in one run.
Aggressive — will attack on sight.

hunts.name: Hammerhead Crocodile
hunts.coordsNote: NW of Ok'hanu — watch for B-rank nearby
tips: 1 target — soloable.
NW of Ok'hanu at X:11 Y:9.
Caution: a B-rank Hammerhead Crocodile roams nearby — don't accidentally target it.

hunts.name: Yak T'el Squib
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Found around the Iq Rrax Tsoly lake area.
Already completed per bill.

hunts.name: Turali Hawksbill
tips: 2 targets — kill both to complete.
Large turtles on the Pyariyoanaan Plain.
Open terrain — visible from a distance.

hunts.name: Defective Turret
tips: 3 targets — kill all 3 to complete.
Mechanical enemies in East Yyasulani.
Watch for explosive attacks.

hunts.name: Matchlock Scorpion
hunts.coordsNote: Roams Matchlock Menagerie — Asyle Volcane area
tips: 1 target — soloable.
Found in the Matchlock Menagerie section of Living Memory.
Vilekin-type — watch for poison attacks.

hunts.name: Chupacabra
hunts.coordsNote: Multiple spawn points across zone — use Faloop or hunt Discord
tips: Weekly Elite mark — massive rewards.
Watch for Triclip — telegraphed column AoE on main target.
Group up with other players — tough solo.
Use Faloop.app or hunt Discord for live spawn callouts.
Respawns 5 seconds after previous kill.
